global.description: The ad features a clean layout with product displays, a prominent logo, and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting products with free shipping and a sale.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A rectangular product display with two vertical sections, resembling a product selection interface.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A smaller rectangular product display, similar to the main product display, positioned slightly above it.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Another rectangular product display, mirroring the design of the first, located next to it.

elements.label: Background element
elements.description: A subtle background element that adds depth, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Background element
elements.description: A small decorative element at the bottom, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25', centrally positioned for emphasis.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'ZenDrop' displayed prominently at the top, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bright button labeled 'Shop now', inviting users to take action, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Product price
elements.description: A small text displaying the price '€9.99', positioned near the call to action.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A circular badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching text.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, key elements include product displays and a call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by product displays, the main message in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your next favorite pick, Free shipping over $25, ZenDrop, Shop now, €9.99, SALE
